commit.message:
fix: remove lexical from peerDependencies — bundled as dependency

lexical is an internal implementation detail. Users never touch the
Lexical API directly (no public types, no exported Lexical instances).
Making it a peer was wrong — it required users to install an extra
package they never use.

- Remove peerDependencies.lexical from @lexify/core
- Remove peerDependencies.lexical from @lexify/plugins
- Update install instructions in all READMEs and docs

Users now only need:
  pnpm add @lexify/core

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

V1.0 Production: 14 features, critical bug fixes, Share Extension, rebrand to VelGo

Features:
- Search suggestions (Google/DuckDuckGo/Bing autocomplete)
- Dark Reader (CSS injection dark mode for any page)
- Page translation (Google Translate injection)
- Video detector (JS-based media detection)
- Page capture (full-page screenshot, PDF export, print)
- QR code scanner (AVCaptureSession camera scanner)
- Privacy Shield (per-site tracker/ad stats with weekly report)
- Custom filter lists (ABP format import, auto-update)
- DNS-over-HTTPS (Cloudflare/Google/Quad9)
- Cookie auto-delete (configurable per-domain whitelist)
- Tab groups (color-coded collections)
- Gesture shortcuts (configurable navigation gestures)
- Share Extension (open shared URLs/text in VelGo)
- Advanced ad blocker (269 bundled WebKit rules from JSON)

Bug fixes:
- Reader mode blank screen (Task cancellation + error feedback)
- Tab persistence data loss (removed destructive UserDefaults.removeObject)
- WKWebView memory leak (script handler cleanup)
- MediaPlayer observer race condition
- Tab preview empty on relaunch (snapshot restore from disk)
- Toolbar debounce (prevent accidental taps)
- Tracking param redirect loop fix
- Snapshot alpha warning (opaque UIGraphicsImageRenderer)
- 9 Swift 6 deinit isolation warnings
- AdBlock regex lookahead crash (WKContentRuleList incompatibility)
- WebView pool: LRU eviction with proper cleanup
- Debounced autosave (2s) prevents data loss on crash

Architecture:
- WebView pool for tab switching without reload
- Removed .id(activeTab.id) forcing view recreation
- 9 new services registered in DIContainer
- Share Extension target with velgo:// URL scheme
- .gitignore: DS_Store, xcuserdata

Rebrand: Display name VeloBrowser → VelGo (UI, widgets, privacy policy)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: Add GHA automation for daily issue and PR insights (#32449)

1. On each run, the script reads the last-run timestamp from hashy (or
   computes one from the `HOURS_LOOKBACK` input for manual runs)
2. Fetches all issues and PRs created since that timestamp via the
GitHub API
3. Filters for "no response" items: issues with 0 comments, PRs with no
   comments and no reviews
4. Posts a Slack message with counts and linked lists of no-response
items
5. Saves the current timestamp to hashy for the next run

---------

commit.message:
Improve run heatmap with density grid and color gradient

Replace transparent polyline overlay with a proper density-based
heatmap: gaussian splat per GPS point into a pixel grid, sqrt-normalized,
then mapped to a blue→cyan→yellow→white color ramp. Computation runs
in a background isolate with 120ms debounce on camera changes so

commit.message:
feat(acp): Session persistence, connection health and UI polish (#45)

* feat(acp): Add heartbeat, dead connection cleanup and connection logging

- Add Rust-side heartbeat task with 15s ping interval and 3-strike disconnect
- Clean up dead connections in `acp_connect` and `acp_check_health`
- Emit structured connection log events via `acp:log`
- Add `HeartbeatEvent`, `ConnectionLogEntry` and `ConnectionConfig` types
- Add `chat_panel_size` field to session persistence

* feat(acp): Persist session state across minimize/restore and reload history

- Add in-memory session cache with global event listener independent of React lifecycle
- Keep DirectoryWorkspace mounted via CSS hidden when minimized
- Add `persistedWorkspaceId` to AppContext for mount/visibility separation
- Always call `acp_load_session` to replay full conversation from ACP backend
- Restore cached messages on "already loaded" fallback
- Add periodic 30s heartbeat in `useAcpConnection` for proactive disconnect detection
- Remove auto-disconnect on unmount; move disconnect to explicit close/forget
- Add connection logs panel with `useAcpLogs` hook and `ConnectionLogs` component
- Add i18n strings for connection logs and ACP status

* test(acp): Add tests for connection hook and logs hook

- Test connect/disconnect lifecycle, status events, workspace isolation
- Test cached state restoration and health check on mount
- Verify disconnect is not called on unmount
- Test log capture, filtering and clear behavior

* style(ui): Replace X icon with Trash2 on session delete button

* fix(acp): Reset session init on disconnect and auto-reload on "not found"

- Reset `initRef` when `isConnected` goes false so reconnect triggers
  `doInit` and reloads the session in the new copilot process
- Auto-recover in `sendPrompt`: on "Session not found" (-32602), try
  `acp_load_session` then retry the prompt before surfacing the error

* fix(acp): Add 60s streaming timeout to auto-clear stale Stop button

If no streaming event arrives within 60s, `isStreaming` is reset to
false automatically. Prevents the Stop button from staying red
indefinitely when `end_turn` is never received.

* fix: replace native button with shadcn Button and localize aria-label in ErrorConsole

- Use Button (variant=ghost, size=icon) from shadcn/ui
- Add useTranslation() and use t('common.dismiss') for aria-label
- Add common.dismiss key to pt-BR.json ("Dispensar") and en.json ("Dismiss")

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(acp): Avoid awaiting async ops while holding connections mutex

In `acp_connect` and `acp_check_health`, `is_alive().await` and
`shutdown().await` were called while the connections mutex was held,
potentially stalling other ACP commands behind long waits.

Refactored both functions to remove the entry under the lock, drop the
lock, perform async checks/shutdown outside it, then re-acquire the
lock only to re-insert (if still alive) or finalize cleanup.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(acp): Ensure `onConnect` runs even if `onDisconnect` rejects

In `handleReconnect`, if `onDisconnect()` rejected the promise chain
would abort before calling `onConnect()`, leaving the UI stuck in an
error state. Wrapped `onDisconnect` in try/catch so `onConnect`
always executes regardless of disconnect errors.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(acp): Fix listener guard and add streaming timer in session-cache

Flip listenerSetup flag only after the Tauri event listener resolves,
allowing retries if setup fails. Also call resetStreamingTimer() in
addUserMessage so the isStreaming flag is always auto-cleared if no
backend events follow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(ui): Replace hardcoded hex colors with HSL CSS variables in index.css

Add --terminal-code CSS variable and replace all #3dd68c and #56d4dd
hex values with hsl(var(--success)) and hsl(var(--terminal-code))
respectively, ensuring colors respect the app theme system.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(ui): Use semantic token and localize done label in TerminalMessage

Replace hex color class with text-success/60 semantic token and
localize the hardcoded "done" label via useTranslation().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(acp): Full state reset on session load and clear idle timer on workspace change

Reset all local state fields (currentMode, availableModes,
activeAcpSessionId, agentPlanFilePath) when loading an existing session
to prevent stale UI state. Also clear idleTimerRef in the workspaceId
effect cleanup so timers don't fire on the wrong workspace.

* fix(ui): Use @/ alias for ConnectionLogs and re-trigger init on session change

Replace relative import with @/ path alias. Add a dedicated effect to
reset initRef when session identity changes so doInit() reruns when a
different session is mounted on the same connected workspace.

Drop the connections lock before calling conn.shutdown().await,

* Fix macOS ODR: add -fno-modules; fix ANT.pri line continuations

-fno-modules disables Clang's implicit module system for Qt6 framework
headers. Without it, QwtPlot gets two type identities (one from QWT's
double-quote includes, another via Qt framework module imports), causing:
  cannot convert WorkoutPlotZoomer* to QwtPlot*

* Fix macOS QWT ODR: bypass qwt.prf, use flat QWT_INSTALL path

qwt.prf includes the installed qwtconfig.pri at project build time.
With Qt 6.7.3 (which uses frameworks), qwtconfig.pri detects
qt_framework in CONFIG and adds QwtFramework to QWT_CONFIG.
qwt.prf then sets INCLUDEPATH to qwt.framework/Headers instead of
the flat include/ directory. This creates two QwtPlot type identities
(flat headers from direct double-quote includes vs framework headers
from qwt_plot_item.h's chain), causing the Clang ODR error:
  cannot convert WorkoutPlotZoomer* to QwtPlot*

Fix: pass QWT_INSTALL=/usr/local/qwt-6.2.0 to qmake instead of using
QMAKEFEATURES. The macx block in PowerVelo.pro now manually adds the
flat INCLUDEPATH and -lqwt linkage, bypassing qwt.prf entirely.
Remove QMAKEFEATURES env var from the CI Create Makefile step.

the Clang ODR error: WorkoutPlotZoomer cannot convert to QwtPlot.

- src/_subclassQWT/workoutplot.cpp
- src/_subclassQWT/workoutplotlist.cpp

* Windows: stub out ANT USB — replace with BTLE

Remove all ANT USB library source compilation on Windows. The USB stick
code has numerous MSVC/TCHAR incompatibilities and will be replaced by
the BTLE stack anyway.

- Add hub_win_stub.cpp: identical no-op Hub implementation to hub_mac_stub.cpp

* Fix Fit.pri: expand SOURCES wildcard for MSVC compatibility

qmake does not expand ___BEGIN___COMMAND_DONE_MARKER___$LASTEXITCODEPWD/*.cpp wildcards in SOURCES when generating
MSVC/nmake Makefiles — the literal glob is passed to cl.exe which fails.
List all .cpp files explicitly.

* Windows CI: use 8.3 short path for Windows Kit to fix LNK1181

The WINKIT_INSTALL path 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/...' has
spaces. qmake emits it unquoted in the linker response file, causing
the linker to treat 'Files' as 'Files.obj' (LNK1181).

Use GetShortPathName() to convert to an 8.3 path (no spaces) before
passing to qmake.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Windows: remove WINKIT_INSTALL — MSVC finds system libs via LIB env var

Gdi32 and User32 are resolved automatically by the MSVC linker using
the LIB environment variable set by the MSVC Developer Command Prompt.
The explicit -L path is unnecessary and caused LNK1181 because qmake
emitted the path (with spaces in 'Program Files (x86)') unquoted in
the linker response file.

- PowerVelo.pro: remove isEmpty/WINKIT_INSTALL; keep -lGdi32 -lUser32
